meaning: adj.线向不正的,方向偏离的,不重合的,未对准的
examples: A severely misaligned exchange rate calls for action.
A misaligned spine puts extra stress on your jaw joints.
Everywhere you looked, moreover, incentives were misaligned.
Only it is beyond my reach because coverage from insurance or medicare remain misguided and misaligned.
He sees these flawed predictions as a combination of physiological biases, methodology errors, and misaligned incentives.
